name: get_directions
description: Calculate directions and routes between an origin and destination. Returns step-by-step navigation instructions, distance, duration, polyline geometry, and supports multiple travel modes and waypoints.

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: The starting point as an address, coordinates (lat,lng), or place ID.

parameters.name: destination
parameters.description: The ending point as an address, coordinates (lat,lng), or place ID.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Travel mode. One of: driving, walking, bicycling, transit.

parameters.name: waypoints
parameters.description: Intermediate stops, pipe-separated. Prefix with 'optimize:true' to optimize order.
parameters.example: optimize:true|Santa Barbara, CA|San Luis Obispo, CA

parameters.name: departure_time
parameters.description: Departure time as Unix timestamp or 'now' for current traffic conditions.

parameters.name: avoid
parameters.description: Features to avoid, pipe-separated. Options: tolls, highways, ferries, indoor.

parameters.name: units
parameters.description: Unit system for distances. One of: metric, imperial.
